headline: 2 Consumer Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Retailers are adapting their business models as technology changes how people shop. But many seem to be moving too slowly as their demand is lagging, causing the industry to underperform the market - over the past six months, retail stocks were flat while the S&P 500 climbed by 4.8%.
